questions.question: What is the primary focus of this video, according to Ortlund?
options: Looking forward at the state of Protestant apologetics rather than mainly dissecting Ben's conversion
A detailed critique of Ben's conversion to Eastern Orthodoxy
A debate with Eastern Orthodox apologists
Announcing Ortlund's own change of denomination
questions.answer: Looking forward at the state of Protestant apologetics rather than mainly dissecting Ben's conversion

questions.question: Pastor Ben of Cleave to Antiquity was known for what before announcing his move to Eastern Orthodoxy?
options: A shrinking channel focused on liturgics
A growing YouTube channel doing Protestant apologetics
questions.answer: A growing YouTube channel doing Protestant apologetics

questions.question: Under "take a deep breath," what does Ortlund warn can happen "very easily" in the heat of online religion drama?
options: People stop caring about doctrine entirely
Everyone converts to the same tradition
Respond uncharitably while swept up in emotion
questions.answer: Respond uncharitably while swept up in emotion

questions.question: What silly triumphalist claim does Ortlund mention some people make when someone joins their "team"?
Why does Ortlund say he is not yet going deep into Ben's specific arguments?
options: He wants more time to hear the arguments and feels what he has heard so far does not clearly show why Eastern Orthodoxy specifically vs. alternatives like Oriental Orthodoxy
He believes Ben's arguments are not worth answering
He is legally barred from responding
He has never watched Ben's content
questions.answer: He wants more time to hear the arguments and feels what he has heard so far does not clearly show why Eastern Orthodoxy specifically vs. alternatives like Oriental Orthodoxy

questions.question: With whom does Ortlund mention Ben did an interview (as named in the talk)?
What does "touch grass" mean in Ortlund's usage?
options: Avoid being sucked into the internet in ways that increase anxiety, anger, and distortion; step back into broader life
questions.answer: Avoid being sucked into the internet in ways that increase anxiety, anger, and distortion; step back into broader life

questions.question: How does Ortlund nuance the slogan that the internet is "not real life"?
options: He fully agrees—it has no significance
He argues the internet is more real than embodied church
He says only email is real; social media is fake
He finds it sometimes unhelpful because the internet is part of life (bills, relationships, information), but it is not the whole of life
questions.answer: He finds it sometimes unhelpful because the internet is part of life (bills, relationships, information), but it is not the whole of life

questions.question: What age does Ortlund give as his own when discussing life experience before YouTube?
Ortlund claims Protestants are often MORE focused on which areas than on defending Protestantism specifically?
options: General Christian apologetics, culture war, and political issues
questions.answer: General Christian apologetics, culture war, and political issues

questions.question: Whom does Ortlund mention alongside himself in the joke about a "scholarly aesthetic" on YouTube?
Which monumental work does Ortlund attribute to Philip Schaff?
options: Identifying the authentic letters of Ignatius
The first critical edition of the Apostolic Fathers
History of the Christian Church (and Nicene and Post-Nicene Fathers series)
questions.answer: History of the Christian Church (and Nicene and Post-Nicene Fathers series)

questions.question: Who wrote the popular text Early Christian Doctrines, per Ortlund?
Which Protestant does Ortlund credit with identifying the authentic letters of Ignatius?
Who produced the first definitive critical edition of the writings of the Apostolic Fathers, according to Ortlund?
The term "prology" (distinct from Patristics), as Ortlund tells it, especially connects to which century and milieu?
When did Ortlund start his YouTube channel?
Which topic's video does Ortlund say generated an unusually large swarm of responses (including some over three hours long)?
options: Young men converting to Eastern Orthodoxy

questions.question: Which scholar does Ortlund mention in connection with translating the Acts of Nicaea II?
Which named YouTuber does Ortlund praise as a "great scholar" doing great work?
Which channel does Ortlund name for church history videos?
What is Ortlund's paired advice: eager people should be more ___, and cautious people should be more ___.
Whom does Ortlund cite as a young creator whose videos are skillfully done on denominations?
Which preacher does Ortlund mention as not having a doctorate when pushing back on pure elitism?
What does Ortlund say will be somewhat less his focus for the immediate next few months?
options: Protestant apologetics (while he writes a book and leans toward general Christian apologetics)
questions.answer: Protestant apologetics (while he writes a book and leans toward general Christian apologetics)

questions.question: What kind of hunger does Ortlund emphasize in his plea for ordained and credentialed people to "speak up" online?
options: Spiritual hunger and anxiety; hunger for spiritual fathers and theological mentors
Hunger to end all ecumenical dialogue
questions.answer: Spiritual hunger and anxiety; hunger for spiritual fathers and theological mentors
